hero.title: Entremares
hero.subtitle: Premium Artisanal Alfajores
hero.description: Discover the rich heritage of craftsmanship in every bite. Our artisanal alfajores are handcrafted with passion, using traditional methods and premium ingredients.

brand.story: At Entremares, we believe in the power of tradition and the joy of giving. Each alfajor is a testament to generations of craftsmanship, made with love and the finest ingredients.
brand.craftsmanship: Discover the rich heritage of craftsmanship and authentic flavor in every alfajor.
